meaning: adj.依靠的,依赖的,由...决定的,随...而定的
examples: The area is heavily dependent on tourism.
She is still financially dependent on her parents.
She had grown ever more peevishly dependent on him.
Pakistan is an agrarian economy and has rural population largely dependent on natural resources.
Long dependent on finicky foreign capital to stimulate growth, emerging markets have often collapsed when capital left.
